creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 172094
patch to update math/saga from 2.2.7 to 2.3.0

SAGA GIS version 2.3.0 is the first one, released as a long term stable branch [LTR], ideal for eg using in processing in graphics/qgis.

The source code repository was migrated from svn to git. The were several bugfixes and a few new features since 2.2.7.


Tested with Poudriere (F093i/a, F10.3a and HEADa), also 'portlint -AC' is fine.
